title: Siri set for a big upgrade as Apple begins testing ChatGPT and Gemini like multi-request processing feature
snippet: Apple is testing a new Siri upgrade that lets users combine multiple requests in a single query. The feature is expected to debut at WWDC 2026 in June and roll out with iOS 27 in September.&nbsp;

title: X down again? Elon Musk's social media platform suffers another outage for thousands of users
snippet: Elon Musk's social media platform X is experiencing outages for thousands of users worldwide, according to Downdetector.&nbsp;

title: Anthropic's AI coding tool, Claude Code, accidentally reveals its source code; here's what happened
snippet: Anthropic accidentally exposed the full source code of its AI tool Claude Code due to a packaging error. While no user data or core AI systems were affected, the leak revealed the tool’s internal workings, raising concerns over security practices.

title: India's average monthly mobile data consumption crossed 31 GB mark, 5G traffic grew by 70%: Report
snippet: The report also said that India has now the world's second-largest 5G subscriber base, 5G data consumption and 5G FWA user base, highlight strong momentum in 5G adoption in India.

title: H-1B selection rates see 50% jump
snippet: Companies, particularly in the technology sector, that seek to bring skilled foreign workers to the US filed fewer petitions for these non-immigrant visas this season due to high application fees and uncertainty amid an overhaul of the lottery system.

title: Here’s why some people choose cryonics to store their bodies and brains after death
snippet: This week I reported on some rather unusual research that focuses on the brain of L. Stephen Coles. Coles was a gerontologist who died from pancreatic cancer in 2014.
